name: Cheese-Shrimp Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes, celery, onion, and boiling water in the cooker.
2. Cover and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours or on high for 3 to 4 hours until potatoes are tender.
3. During the last hour of cooking, stir in pepper, evaporated milk, cheese, and shrimps.
4. When ready to serve, stir in sherry and salt.
5. Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Makes about 2 quarts.
